inputs.label: Reaction Order (n)
inputs.businessContext: Reaksiyon mertebesi (0, 1, 2…) Hesaplama sıfırıncı, birinci ve ikinci mertebe için geçerlidir.

formulas.rateLawExpression: reactionOrder === 0 ? 'Rate = k' : reactionOrder === 1 ? 'Rate = k[A]' : reactionOrder === 2 ? 'Rate = k[A]²' : 'Rate = k[A]^' + reactionOrder
formulas.halfLife: (reactionOrder === 0) ? ((initialConcentration * time) / (2 * (initialConcentration - finalConcentration))) : (reactionOrder === 1) ? ((Math.log(2) * time) / Math.log(initialConcentration / finalConcentration)) : (reactionOrder === 2) ? (time / ((initialConcentration / finalConcentration) - 1)) : 0
